column1: US Wireless Competitive Analysis — Postpaid Phone KPIs (Quarterly)
Source: Company Earnings Releases (Verizon / T-Mobile / AT&T) — Q1 2023 through Q4 2024
Metric definitions below table. Figures are approximate.
POSTPAID PHONE SUBSCRIBERS — END OF PERIOD (millions)

Wireless Service Revenue: Total wireless service revenue reported by segment (Verizon Consumer + Business wireless; T-Mobile total wireless service; AT&T Mobility service revenue). Excludes equipment/device revenue.
Postpaid Phone Net Adds: Net change in postpaid phone subscribers for the period (new activations minus deactivations/churned). Phone lines only; excludes tablets
Postpaid Phone Subscribers: Total postpaid phone connections at end of reporting period. Phone lines only.
Postpaid Phone Churn: Monthly postpaid phone churn rate (%). Calculated as disconnected phone lines / average phone lines in period.
Postpaid Phone ARPU: Average Revenue Per User per month for postpaid phone subscribers. Calculated as postpaid phone service revenue / average postpaid phone connections.
